SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:MealDraftContract.kt$MealDraftEvent.AddManualItem$/** * Adds a fully-known item (manual entry or scaled search result) without * going through QuickAddManualUseCase ŌĆö the entry stays local until commit. */
